docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, EVA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SNEED, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, EVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $75.00 SERVED MAY-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, EVA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN SNEED IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVA GARCIA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SNEED, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, EVA $2,386.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,536.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE WAS A FENDER BENDER WITH NO PROPERTY DAMAGE. COURT DOES NOT FIND TESTIMONY OF THE DEFENDANT THAT THERE WAS NO FENDER BENDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTED AMOUNT OF DAMAGES FOR SUCH A LOW IMPACT FENDER BENDER ARE EXCESSIVE AND DOES NOT ADD UP. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
